content:
type: STATUS
files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
summary: Added ImageBlock.get_image_mimetype() method, refactored image_to_base64 to call it instead of inline filetype.guess; did not touch image normalization logic, should not conflict with a normalize_image_bytes helper as long as it doesn't also rewrite image_to_base64's mimetype block
